project.name: Eldeco La Vida Bella
project.address: Plot No. GH-02C, Sector 12, Noida Extension, Uttar Pradesh 201318
project.description: Eldeco La Vida Bella is a premium, low-density residential development in Sector 12 featuring spacious corner-only apartments, resort-style landscaping, and an expansive 35,000 sqft clubhouse.
project.long_description: Eldeco La Vida Bella is the latest flagship residential launch by the legendary Eldeco Group in Sector 12, Noida Extension. Nestled on a beautifully positioned 3.71-acre corner plot, the project offers 335 to 357 exquisitely designed residences across 5 high-rise towers rising up to G+22 floors. The development features an exceptionally low density of just 90 units per acre, creating a peaceful, spacious sanctuary. Every apartment is planned as a corner unit with three open sides, maximizing cross-ventilation, daylight penetration, and sweeping views of the 1.7-acre central greens. Built with advanced Mivan/Korean framework technology, units feature premium specifications including 11 ft floor-to-ceiling heights, imported marble floorings, digital smart door locks, and multi-split air conditioners. The community is anchored by Sangeet, a magnificent G+2 35,000 sqft clubhouse, complete with a rooftop pool, private lounge, and premium dining zones.

builder.name: Eldeco Group
builder.company_overview: Eldeco Group is a pioneer in real estate development in North India, active since 1975. The enterprise has completed more than 200 projects, delivering over 30 million square feet of residential, commercial, and township space. Headquartered in New Delhi, the company is highly acclaimed for corporate transparency, robust engineering, and spacious low-density lifestyle layouts.
awards: Developer of the Year North India

unit_types.name: 2 BHK (Comfort Plus)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 2 bedroom corner layout
unit_types.description: Thoughtfully planned 2 BHK corner unit featuring Mivan finishes, large balcony, and direct access to central landscaping.
whats_included: Vitrified floor tiles in living space

unit_types.name: 3 BHK (Elite Resort)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 3 BHK with wrap balconies
unit_types.description: Premium 3 BHK layout featuring 11 ft floor heights, a separate formal dining alcove, and private dress room in master suite.
whats_included: Imported Italian marble flooring in living spaces

unit_types.name: 4 BHK (Grande Resort)
unit_types.subtitle: Palatial 4 BHK with double-height lobby entry
unit_types.description: The crown unit of La Vida Bella featuring expansive room ratios, premium modular kitchen, and double-glazed outer windows.
whats_included: Premium Italian marble across living and formal drawing

assumptions: All pricing reflects actual market rate lists under RERA filing.
GST is applicable at 5% for standard construction link pathways.

payment_plan.notes: Special 30% upfront and 70% at structural completion makes it highly attractive.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Eldeco La Vida Bella is a top-tier resort-style lifestyle asset in Sector 12, offering excellent spatial value and signature low-density privacy.
why_buy: Extremely Low Density: Spans 3.71 acres with just 335 to 357 units, bypassing the crowded atmosphere of mega-societies.
Corner Layout Only: Every single apartment is a corner unit with three open sides for optimal ventilation.
Strong Brand Pedigree: Eldeco Group has a legacy of 50 years with over 65 successfully delivered projects.
why_avoid: Premium Pricing: Commands a significant brand premium over neighboring middle-market layouts.
Interim Commuting Friction: Proximity to active construction sites can cause minor traffic bottlenecks.
decision_profile.best_for: Salaried professionals, NRI wealth preservers, and families seeking resort-style security.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: High-yield short-term flippers, or entry-level buyers looking under ₹1 Cr.

buyerPersonas.headline: Peace-Of-Mind Asset Class
reasons: Eldeco Group is historically reliable, offering smooth digital purchase structures.

persona_profile.family_stage: Nuclear family with school children or senior dependants
persona_profile.work_location: Noida central or Greater Noida corporate hub
persona_profile.motivation_note: Driven by the need for secure, spacious, corner housing in a serene community with top clubhouse sports facilities.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: Eldeco La Vida Bella represents one of Sector 12's most secure and luxurious residential assets. Strong construction standard and low density make it highly recommended.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Excellent for end-users prioritizing open layouts, child safety, and active lifestyle clubs.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Stable appreciation play. Excellent capital preservation in one of Noida's fastest-growing sectors.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Very strong. The 1.7-acre central open greens and Kids zones create a vibrant, healthy atmosphere.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Recommended for defensive wealth preservation rather than speculative high-alpha gains.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Highlights G+2 Gated resort lobby, premium digital locks, and top-tier Kohler bath fitments.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Extremely low legal risk. Escrow bank verified with HDFC Bank under strict RERA guidelines.
walk_away_conditions: Budget limit strictly under Rs 1.5 Cr.
negotiation_leverage: Resale units can be leveraged against builder inventory options.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Under construction. Jan 2029 handover. Ideal sweet spot to secure current RERA rates before slab progression.
